What ends up Dictating whether you feel alright with your current level of success is your standard like you know What standard do you demand of yourself? It's like I've used the metaphor in the past about going to the gym You know, we know we go to the gym every day, right? And we work out and we know that we're not gonna actually see results Next morning in other words if you wake up in the mirror and our muscles aren't big enough. I'm not that gym We'll go back again and we'll go back again And we'll keep going back because we know that over time if we stick to it even though those did daily Increases in musculature the daily progress even though that's imperceptible Over time it stacks one top the other and becomes very perceptible and it changes your life Same thing is true of success So, you know Well, every one of these motivations and the weekly intensives and then you practice in the drilling and the training well, there's not We know yet.
